title: Google's New AI Agent Works 24/7 — Even When Your Phone Is Off
script: Google just announced an AI agent that never stops working — even when your phone is off. Gemini Spark runs on Google Cloud around the clock, handles your emails, books appointments, and can authorize purchases on your behalf. The AI Ultra plan that used to cost $250 a month just dropped to $100. The AI agent that does everything you ask just got affordable. And it never sleeps.
